form.formComment: At debut, second last of 8 at this track on April 9 over 1308m, 11 len behind La Cat carrying 55kg at $20.70. Sure to kick on with that run under the belt.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Cistron - Quick Song) making her debut. Nice profile and a bold showing is on the cards.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, ran last of 7 at this track on February 23 over 1106m, 16 len behind Into My Sunset with 56kg at $37.50. Cannot enthuse after the moderate debut effort.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at this track on March 25 over 1106m, 20 len behind Distorted Louv with 52kg at $35.50. Previously second-up in a small field at this track on January 8 over 1006m, 11 len behind Standard Pressure with 55kg at $26.30. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 25 over 1106m, 5 len behind Distorted Louv carrying 57kg at $2.90. The start before that 3rd of 7 at this track on February 23 over 1106m, 8 len behind Into My Sunset with 56kg at $9.90. Worth following up.
